tools.name: scan_for_secrets
tools.description: Scan a pasted config, file, code snippet, or blob for exposed credentials and obvious security misconfigurations. Use whenever a user shares a .env, docker-compose.yml, nginx.conf, JSON/YAML config, or any text and asks "is this safe to share/commit?", "any leaked API keys/secrets?", or "what's misc

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "scan_for_secrets" references sensitive artifacts (.env, credentials, password, secret). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
